scripts.build: npm run prisma:prepare && prisma generate && nuxt build
scripts.dev: npm run prisma:prepare && prisma generate && nuxt dev
scripts.db:push: npm run prisma:prepare && prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: npm run prisma:prepare && prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.db:seed: npm run prisma:prepare && prisma generate && tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.db:reset: npm run prisma:prepare && prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.deploy:local: npm install && npm run build && npm run preview
